channel.title: Anurag Rai Blog
channel.description: Technical notes on systems, full stack engineering, and performance work.

item.title: Why I Jailbroke My Kindle (and What I Discovered)
item.description: Write a one-line summary of this post.

item.title: Fixing Slow WSL File I/O with 9P msize Tuning
item.description: A practical deep dive into WSL cross-boundary 9P performance: where throughput was lost, how Linux and WSL limits interact, and why precise cap tuning achieved near-2x gains.

item.title: From Systems Thinking to Full Stack
item.description: How a systems mindset influences the way I design frontend and backend features.
